headline: Google Invests $40 Billion in Anthropic in Largest Startup Deal Ever
summary: The deal begins with $10 billion upfront at a $380 billion valuation, with the rest contingent on performance milestones. Anthropic's annual revenue surpassed $30 billion, driven by Claude Code demand.

headline: GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro Now Available via OpenAI API
summary: OpenAI released both models via API on April 24, 2026, for Plus, Pro, Business, and Enterprise subscribers in ChatGPT and Codex, with superior agentic coding and higher token efficiency.
